items.title: Fix infinite loop in api-key-bridge MutationObserver in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves a critical issue causing `docs.acedata.cloud` to freeze on load due to an infinite loop triggered by the `MutationObserver` in `api-key-bridge.js`. Key changes include the introduction of a guard to prevent re-processing of patched elements and a debounce mechanism to handle rapid DOM mutations efficiently. These improvements enhance the stability and performance of the documentation site.

items.title: Empower Your DNS Management Skills in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a powerful DNS management skill for handling DNSPod records through Copilot. Key features include a comprehensive API wrapper for CRUD operations, domain listing, and record searching, along with detailed documentation for users. The skill supports multiple domains, enhancing the management capabilities for AceDataCloud users.

items.title: Boosting SEO for Better Visibility in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the SEO of the documentation site by changing the global description to English, ensuring proper meta descriptions for non-CN pages. It also adds Open Graph descriptions for social sharing, implements GA4 analytics configuration, and deduplicates old CN use-case pages with new equivalents. Additionally, six redirect rules have been established for old URLs to improve user navigation.

items.title: Enhanced Document Processing Limit and Selection in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update increases the default document processing limit from 10 to 15 per run, enhancing throughput. Additionally, it introduces a recency-weighted selection mechanism that prioritizes newer documents, improving the relevance of processed materials. The changes also include logging for weight distribution and file age, providing better insights into the selection process.

items.title: Enhance local documentation sourcing and logging in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the cloning of the Docs repository with direct usage of local documentation files from PlatformBackend/docs/en/. Additionally, verbose timestamped logging has been implemented to improve tracking and debugging. These changes streamline the documentation sync process and enhance operational transparency.

items.title: Enhance SEO Metadata and Verification in Docs 📄
items.summary: This update improves the SEO capabilities by updating the Google Search Console verification code in the docs.json file. Additionally, the sync.py script has been modified to include a metadata block that preserves important SEO elements like og:image and twitter:card during daily syncs. These changes aim to enhance visibility and maintain consistency in metadata across updates.

items.title: New Auth Bridge for API Key Sync in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new `/auth/bridge` page that allows the documentation site to securely obtain users' API keys through `postMessage`. Key enhancements include OAuth login redirection, strict origin validation, and automatic popup closure after syncing. Security measures ensure no tokens are exposed in URL parameters.

items.title: Enhance API Key Injection with Custom JS in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a custom JavaScript file that automates API key injection from platform.acedata.cloud into Mintlify's interactive playground. Users can now authenticate and retrieve their API credentials without leaving the documentation page, enhancing the overall user experience with features like localStorage persistence and toast notifications for sync status.

items.title: Enhance Canary Rule Updates in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes several critical bugs in the `update-canary-rule` command, ensuring that existing fields are merged instead of clobbered during updates. Key changes include the introduction of helper functions for better code organization, adjustments to default operators, and improved documentation with examples for body condition types. These enhancements lead to more reliable canary rule management and prevent crashes during updates.

items.title: Boost SEO with GSC Verification and Auto-Generated Descriptions in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances SEO capabilities by adding Google Search Console verification through a new meta tag in `docs.json`. Additionally, the `og:image` has been updated with a new brand card image, and the auto-generation of descriptions in `sync.py` has been fixed to ensure they persist through daily syncs. These changes aim to improve visibility and user engagement.

items.title: Enhance Title Handling for LLM Outputs in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the title handling in the backend by implementing a fallback mechanism for generic placeholder titles returned by LLMs. When a placeholder title is detected, the system now defaults to the source document's title, ensuring better content accuracy and relevance. This change enhances the overall user experience by providing more meaningful titles.

items.title: Streamlined Pricing Table and Enhanced Translations in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update merges the dynamic and fixed pricing tables into a single unified table in Price.vue, simplifying the user interface. Additionally, the `seconds` key has been added to the i18n files across all 12 locales, ensuring accurate display of per-second pricing in the UI. These changes enhance clarity and usability for users navigating the pricing page.

items.title: Enhanced Sidebar Navigation Translations in Docs 🌍
items.summary: This update introduces translations for sidebar navigation labels into 18 languages using GPT-4.1-mini, ensuring a more localized experience for users. The Chinese sidebar now displays fully localized names, and translations are cached in .cache/nav_translations.json. Additionally, modifications were made to the sync script to support these changes.

items.title: Fix default model value to prevent overcharging in Backend ⚡
items.summary: This update addresses an issue where users calling `/flux/images` without a specified `model` field were incorrectly charged 1.0 credits instead of the intended 0.1 credits. By adding `flux-dev` as a default value in the model cost rules, all relevant rules can now match correctly, ensuring accurate billing. All cost tests have been successfully passed after this modification.

items.title: Enhance Sora Cost Rules for Unified Pricing Display in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces explicit version conditions to the Sora cost rules, ensuring that both v1 and v2 rules are properly defined. The changes allow the frontend to render a unified pricing table, enhancing user experience on the pricing page. All relevant tests have been updated and successfully passed, ensuring stability and reliability.

items.title: Streamline sync_publish_materials by Removing Django Dependency in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the Django ORM with raw psycopg2 for database access in the sync_publish_materials script. As a result, the only dependencies required are psycopg2-binary and requests, simplifying the CI process. The changes enhance performance and reduce complexity in the backend workflow.

items.title: Boosting SEO with New Metadata and Files in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances SEO by adding llms.txt and llms-full.txt files, improving AI search engine discoverability. Meta descriptions have been completed for 25 pages, including blogs and comparisons, which is expected to increase click-through rates. Additionally, social media metadata has been integrated to enhance sharing visuals. A merge conflict in the SEO generation script has also been resolved.

items.title: Enhance API Playground with Interactive Features in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update transforms the API playground from a simple display to an interactive experience, allowing users to utilize a Try It / Send button on all API reference pages. Key enhancements include the addition of auto-generated code snippets in multiple languages and the ability to prefill request body fields with OpenAPI example values. Users can now easily input their Bearer token and execute API calls directly from the documentation.

items.title: Enhance Docs Sync to PublishMaterial with LLM in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new script and a cron workflow to sync content from the Docs repository to the PublishMaterial table using LLM rewriting. It supports 11 different channel styles and includes multi-language capabilities. The process is designed to be idempotent, ensuring no duplicates are created during execution.

items.title: Enhance Creator Fees Accuracy in Roadmap 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves a timestamp alignment bug that caused the 'Last 24 hours' creator fees to display as 0.0000 SOL. By implementing new API intervals for 24h and 7d calculations, the accuracy of the fees has significantly improved, resulting in a more reliable representation of creator earnings. The changes also ensure that the 30d cutoff starts at the beginning of the day to prevent similar issues.

items.title: Enhance API Resilience and Update Intervals in Roadmap 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses the failure of the daily updates workflow caused by changes in the pump.fun API. The script now uses a valid `1d` interval for fetching creator fees, ensuring accurate data retrieval. Additionally, the workflow has been improved to allow other data generation steps to continue even if one fails, enhancing overall resilience.

items.title: Introducing the Promotion Page for Nexior in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: We've added a comprehensive promotion page for Nexior, detailing its product positioning, core features, technical architecture, business model, and deployment guide. This new documentation aims to enhance user understanding and facilitate quick deployment of AI applications without any development experience. Check it out to explore how Nexior can empower users to monetize AI capabilities effortlessly.

items.title: Enhance Sidebar Translations in Docs 📚
items.summary: This update introduces Chinese translations for category names in the sidebar navigation, ensuring a more localized experience for users. Key changes include the addition of a `CATEGORY_NAMES_ZH` dictionary and the application of translations across 12 languages. The documentation has been re-generated to reflect these updates, improving accessibility for non-English speakers.

items.title: Enhance PWA Support with Manifest and SEO Boost in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a web app manifest and theme color meta tag to improve our PWA capabilities and Lighthouse SEO scores. Key changes include the addition of a `manifest.json` file and updates to `index.html`, enabling the 'Install app' prompt in Chrome and Edge. These enhancements will provide a better user experience and improve our app's visibility.

items.title: Launch Nexior Introduction Page in Backend 🚀
items.summary: We've added a comprehensive introduction page for Nexior, showcasing its capabilities as an all-in-one AI consumer platform. This new page includes a responsive HTML/CSS layout, detailed service overviews, user testimonials, and a deployment guide, enhancing user engagement and understanding of Nexior's features. Additionally, the content will be auto-translated into 17 languages to reach a broader audience.

items.title: Enhance SEO with hreflang Tags for 12 Languages in Frontend Web 🌍
items.summary: This update introduces hreflang alternate link tags for all 12 supported locales on SEO-enabled pages. Key changes include the addition of functions to manage these tags, ensuring search engines serve the correct language version to users and preventing duplicate content penalties. The implementation follows BCP 47 standards for locale mapping.

items.title: Enhance SEO with Meta Tags in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces essential SEO meta tags to Nexior, including a new title, meta description, keywords, and Open Graph tags. These changes will improve how hub.acedata.cloud is indexed by search engines and enhance social media sharing previews. The addition of a canonical URL also helps in maintaining content integrity.

items.title: Enhance API Docs with FAQ Schema in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces FAQPage JSON-LD structured data to API document pages, enabling Google to display rich snippets in search results. Key changes include new functions for setting and removing FAQ schemas, as well as auto-generated FAQs based on API and service data. This enhancement improves the visibility and usability of API documentation.

items.title: Enhance Homepage with Organization JSON-LD in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Organization JSON-LD structured data to the homepage, enhancing SEO for Google Knowledge Panel visibility. Key changes include new functions for setting and removing organization data in the SEO utility and injecting this data on the homepage. This improvement aims to display the brand's logo, description, and social links when users search for 'Ace Data Cloud'.

items.title: Enhance SEO with BreadcrumbList JSON-LD in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces BreadcrumbList JSON-LD structured data to improve search result visibility. Key changes include new functions for managing breadcrumbs in the SEO utility and updated breadcrumb trails in service and document detail pages. This enhancement is expected to boost click-through rates by 20-30% in Google search results.

items.title: Refine log messages for clarity in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update removes references to 'partner channel' from the Sora v2 log messages, enhancing the clarity of the logs by avoiding exposure of internal implementation details. The changes ensure that the logs remain focused on relevant information without disclosing sensitive terms.

items.title: Exciting Sora v2 Support Added in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Sora v2 support, featuring a new version parameter for enhanced functionality. Key changes include time-based billing adjustments, an updated OpenAPI specification, and comprehensive documentation with code examples. Additionally, 8 new cost tests have been added, bringing the total to 584 passing tests.

items.title: Enhance sitemap with alias URLs and static pages in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the sitemap.xml for better SEO by implementing alias-based URLs instead of UUIDs for documents. It also introduces static pages for /earning, /terms, and /privacy, enhancing the overall user experience and site navigation. A fallback to UUIDs is maintained for items without aliases.

items.title: Enhance AI Discoverability with Nginx Proxy in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new Nginx location block to proxy the /llms.txt endpoint to the backend. This change enhances the discoverability of the AI search engine through GEO, improving overall functionality. The modification includes 4 new lines in the nginx.conf.template file.

items.title: Add dynamic llms.txt endpoint for GEO in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new `/llms.txt` endpoint that adheres to the llmstxt.org specification, enhancing Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). Key changes include the addition of a view to generate the llms.txt file from the database, updates to the robots.txt file to advertise the new endpoint, and the registration of the URL route in the core application. This will improve accessibility for AI search engines and streamline service discovery.

items.title: Enhanced API Docs with Platform Token Links in Backend 🚀
items.summary: All 17 platform API documentation pages that require authentication have been updated to include links to the Platform Token documentation. This ensures consistency across the documentation, enhancing user experience and clarity for developers. Key areas updated include Credential, Application, Order, and Usage APIs.

items.title: Enhance Sora v2 Partner Channel Support in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for the Sora v2 partner channel through a new version=2 request parameter. Key changes include the addition of methods for generating partner videos and improved metadata handling for time-based billing. The API now supports POST requests to /sora/videos with enhanced parameters for better flexibility.

items.title: Normalize Suno Timing API Response in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses inconsistencies in the Suno Timing API response formats by normalizing the output to match the documented structure. Key changes include mapping the `alignment` field to `aligned_words`, and ensuring default values for missing fields like `waveform_data`, `hoot_cer`, and `is_streamed`. The modifications enhance the reliability of the API and improve integration with upstream providers.
